heading: Transferred
label: 2471, 2471a Transferred
notes: CodificationSection 2471, , , , which related to the National Space Council, was transferred and is set out as a note under , National and Commercial Space Programs.Pub. L. 100–685, title V, § 501102 Stat. 4102section 20111 of Title 51Nov. 17, 1988A prior section 2471, , , ; , , ; , , ; , , ; , §§ 305(13)(A), 306(c), , , 428; , , , which related to the establishment, membership, duties, and personnel of the National Aeronautics and Space Council, was omitted from the Code, because the Council, including the office of Executive Secretary of the Council, together with the functions of the Council, was abolished by section 3(a)(4) of Reorg. Plan No. 1 of 1973, 38 F.R. 9579, , effective , set out in the Appendix to Title 5, Government Organization and Employees. was repealed by , , , which Act enacted Title 51.Pub.
